fields.description:
At Vanta, our mission is to help businesses earn and prove trust. We believe that security should be monitored and verified continuously, and we empower companies to practice better security and prove it with ease. Vanta has a kind and talented team, and while some have prior security experience, many have been successful at Vanta without it. 

As a Salesforce Quality Engineer at Vanta, you will build and own our first Business Systems Quality Assurance program—establishing the quality gates, automation framework, and observability infrastructure that will protect revenue-critical workflows and enable the Business Systems team to ship safely at scale.

The Business Systems team owns Vanta's internal GTM and Finance systems—with critical integrations across the revenue and operations stack. This team builds and operates the technical foundation that supports our go-to-market motion, financial operations, and data-driven decision-making across the company.

You'll design and implement the end-to-end QA operating model from scratch, establish risk-based testing strategies, build automated test coverage for critical business journeys, and implement monitoring and alerting systems that catch failures before they impact users. This role directly impacts revenue integrity, operational reliability, and our ability to ship confidently as the business scales.

What you’ll do as a Salesforce Quality Engineer at Vanta:

 - Design and implement the end-to-end QA operating model for Business Systems releases from scratch (intake → risk assessment → test planning → execution → sign-off → post-release verification)

 - Define and track QA program health metrics - including defect escape rate, test coverage, release failure rate, and mean time to detect - to demonstrate value and guide continuous improvement

 - Facilitate or coordinate UAT with business stakeholders for high-impact releases, ensuring sign-off is structured and traceable

 - Build a risk-based quality strategy that prioritizes testing and automation based on revenue impact, data integrity, compliance, and system criticality

 - Establish and maintain a balanced test automation foundation: unit-level (Apex), Salesforce automation (flows/LWC), end-to-end UI regression, REST/SOAP API validation, and integration/service checks for critical workflows spanning Salesforce and connected tools

 - Implement observability and exception reporting infrastructure; establish error detection, alerting, dashboards, and runbooks for Apex classes, flows, and integrations

 - Enable and coach admins and developers to build testable solutions and contribute to quality; drive continuous improvement from incidents into updated tests, gates, and monitoring

 - Define QA standards and templates (test plan, regression checklist, release readiness, rollback plan) and drive adoption across the team

 - Execute targeted manual/exploratory testing for high-risk changes while building the automation foundation to reduce manual burden over time

How to be successful in this role:

 - 5+ years in quality assurance, with at least 3 years with Salesforce QA experience

 - Proven ability to build or scale a QA program from the ground up in greenfield environments (not just executing tests within an established framework)

 - Deep fluency with Salesforce testing practices: Apex unit tests, deployment standards, flow testing concepts, and ability to design scalable regression strategies for Salesforce environments

 - Hands-on experience building and maintaining UI/E2E automation frameworks

 - Familiarity with testing integration workflows and iPaaS tools (Workato, Mulesoft, Boomi, etc.)—understanding retries, idempotency, monitoring, and failure handling patterns

 - Strong stakeholder management skills; able to drive adoption of standards and quality gates without formal authority in environments where QA practices are being introduced for the first time

 - Comfort with ambiguity and building in zero-to-one environments

 - Open to using AI to amplify their skills and strengthen their work - demonstrating curiosity, a willingness to learn, and sound judgment in applying AI responsibly to improve efficiency and impact

 - Experience integrating Salesforce QA into CI/CD pipelines using tools such as Copado, Gearset, Salesforce DX, or GitHub Actions

 - Understanding of Salesforce governor limits and ability to design bulk data and performance tests that validate system behavior at scale

 - Experience with security and access control testing - including profiles, permission sets, field-level security, and sharing rules - particularly in regulated or compliance-sensitive environments

 - Must be authorized to work in the U.S. without the need for current or future employer sponsorship.

 - Open to using AI to amplify their skills and strengthen their work - demonstrating curiosity, a willingness to learn, and sound judgment in applying AI responsibly to improve efficiency and impact.

What you can expect as a Vanta’n:

 - Industry-competitive salary and equity

 - Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage, with 100% of employee-only benefit premiums covered for most medical plans

 - 16 weeks paid Parental Leave for all new parents

 - Health & wellness stipend

 - Remote workspace, internet, and cellphone stipend

 - Commuter benefits for team members who report to the SF and NYC office

 - Family planning benefits

 - Matching 401(k) contribution with immediate vesting

 - Flexible PTO policy, plus 80 hours of Sick Time

 - 11 company-paid holidays

 - Virtual team building activities, lunch and learns, and other company-wide events!

 - Offices in SF, NYC, London, Dublin, Tel Aviv, and Sydney

To provide greater transparency to candidates, we share base pay ranges for all US-based job postings regardless of state. We set standard base pay ranges for all roles based on function, level, and country location, benchmarked against similar-stage growth companies. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors and may vary based on candidate location, skills, depth of work experience, and relevant licenses/credentials.

#LI-remote

At Vanta, we are committed to hiring diverse talent of different backgrounds and as such, it is important to us to provide an inclusive work environment for all. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender identity, age, religion, sexual orientation, veteran or disability status, or any other protected class. As an equal opportunity employer, we encourage and welcome people of all backgrounds to apply.

About Vanta

We started in 2018, in the wake of several high-profile data breaches. Online security was only becoming more important, but we knew firsthand how hard it could be for fast-growing companies to invest the time and manpower it takes to build a solid security foundation. Vanta was inspired by a vision to restore trust in internet businesses by enabling companies to improve and prove their security. From our early days automating security monitoring for compliance standards like SOC 2, HIPAA and ISO 27001 to creating the world's leading Trust Management Platform, our vision remains unchanged. 

Now more than ever, making security continuous—not just a point-in-time check— is essential. Thousands of companies rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their trust— all in a way that's real-time and transparent.

Referral Instructions

If you are being referred for the role, please contact that person to apply on your behalf.
fields.title: Salesforce Quality Engineer
